basics.name: Elia Zonta
basics.label: Computer Engineering student
basics.summary: An italian computer engineering student, my personal interests address parallel and high-performance computing and low latency code.

education.institution: Enrico Fermi Technical Institute, Bassano del Grappa, Italy

work.name: Fondazione Bruno Kessler, Research Centre
work.summary: Performance and inference optimization of CNNs on ESP-32 boards for computer vision tasks.

work.name: Forschungszentrum Jülich, Institute for Advanced Simulations (IAS-4/JSC)

volunteer.name: Fondazione Bruno Kessler, Research Centre
volunteer.summary: Collaborated in a no-profit project for an exhibit to be presented at OHBM 2023, the annual meeting of neurocognitive scientists community.

volunteer.name: Lead The Future Mentorship
volunteer.summary: Among the few Italian students selected to be mentees for LeadTheFuture, a leading mentorship non-profit organization for students in STEM, with acceptance rate below 20%. LeadTheFuture empowers top-performing students to achieve their goals and contribute to their communities by giving them one-on-one guidance from high-impact mentors coming from the world's leading STEM innovation hubs.

awards.title: Public AI Challenge 2022
awards.summary: 12 weeks research-based challenge among teams of students working on problems proposed by private companies and public administration, tackled using Artificial Intelligence. My team worked on a data-validation problem proposed by MeteoTrentino, the weather monitoring office of the Trentino region.

awards.title: Industrial AI Challenge 2023
awards.summary: 12 weeks research based project, developing a predictive maintenance algorithm for tyre vulcanisation processes.
